branding.tagline: Innovative Pre Engineered Building & Steel Structure Solutions
branding.description: Konstruct Technofab Pvt. Ltd. specializes in designing, manufacturing and installing high quality pre engineered buildings, industrial sheds and prefabricated structures. The company focuses on durable construction, cost efficiency and fast project delivery.

home.title: Konstruct Technofab | Pre Engineered Building & Steel Structure Solutions
home.description: Leading manufacturer of PEB structures, industrial sheds, and prefabricated buildings. Cost-effective, durable construction with fast delivery.
home.heroDescription: Konstruct Technofab Pvt. Ltd. specializes in designing, manufacturing and installing high quality pre engineered buildings, industrial sheds and prefabricated structures. Established in 2017 with 200+ employees serving worldwide markets (GST: 23ARFPV2038P1ZD).

about.title: About Konstruct Technofab Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Manufacturer, Exporter, Supplier & Service Provider of PEB structures since 2017. Founded by Md Bilal Rasheed & Rohit Verma.
about.content: We design industrial environments that support business growth. Customized shed design according to client requirements. Modern engineering with strong structural durability. Focus on cost efficiency and fast construction. Strict quality testing process for every structure.

services.title: Construction & Fabrication Services | Konstruct Technofab
services.description: Complete PEB solutions from design consulting to structure fabrication and installation.
services.intro: Comprehensive services covering commercial/industrial construction, PEB fabrication, structure installation, and design consulting.

servicesList.name: Industrial Shed Construction
servicesList.description: Factory Shed, Godown, Warehouse Shed Construction
servicesList.longDescription: Complete industrial shed solutions including Factory Shed Construction, Godown Construction, Warehouse Construction, PEB Structural Sheds and Prefabricated Sheds. Customized design, manufacturing and installation.

servicesList.name: PEB Structure Fabrication
servicesList.longDescription: Precision fabrication of PEB structures, factory sheds, mild steel sheds, girder fabrication and steel prefab cold storage.

servicesList.name: Prefabricated Structures
servicesList.longDescription: Prefabricated industrial structures, pre engineered steel buildings, school buildings and warehouse solutions.

servicesList.name: PEB Structure Installation
servicesList.longDescription: Expert installation of pre engineered buildings with on-site supervision and quality assurance.

servicesList.name: Factory & Warehouse Design Consulting
servicesList.longDescription: Expert consulting for factory layout, warehouse design and PEB structural optimization.

servicesList.name: Cold Storage Structures
servicesList.longDescription: Steel prefab cold storage fabrication and insulated structure manufacturing.

projects.title: Projects | Konstruct Technofab - PEB Portfolio
projects.description: Portfolio of completed PEB structures, industrial sheds and prefabricated buildings across India.
projects.intro: Proud portfolio of pre-engineered building projects showcasing our expertise in industrial sheds, warehouses, factories and specialized structures. Delivered on time with highest quality standards.

projectsList.name: Pithampur Industrial Factory Shed
projectsList.description: 25,000 sq.ft factory shed with crane beam
projectsList.longDescription: Complete turnkey factory shed construction in Pithampur Industrial Area. 25,000 sq.ft covered area with 5-ton EOT crane beam, multi-bay structure and advanced roofing system. Delivered in 45 days.

projectsList.name: Indore Multi-span Warehouse
projectsList.longDescription: Large span warehouse facility for logistics operations in Indore. Clear span 30m, PEB structure with Kirby roofing and insulated panels. Complete with mezzanine floor.

projectsList.name: Madhya Pradesh Cold Storage
projectsList.longDescription: Steel prefab cold storage with PUF panels for -20°C temperature control. 10,000 sq.ft capacity with complete insulation and refrigeration piping support.

projectsList.name: Prefab School Building
projectsList.longDescription: Prefabricated school with 8 classrooms, admin block and assembly hall. Earthquake resistant design completed in 60 days for government project.

projectsList.name: Large-span PEB Manufacturing Unit
projectsList.longDescription: High bay manufacturing unit with 12m eaves height, multiple crane beams and advanced ventilation system. Custom PEB design for heavy machinery.

projectsList.name: Export Steel Structure Project
projectsList.longDescription: Complete steel structure exported to Middle East. Bolt-together design with sea-worthy packing. 15,000 MT project delivered through Mundra port.

contact.title: Contact Konstruct Technofab | PEB Project Inquiries
